Name: Frequency of 'Completed + In Call' directly following 'Accepted + In Progress'
Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' that are not followed by any other activity (i.e., terminal occurrences)
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of 'Completed + In Call' to 'Completed + Resolved' in the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of the variant pattern 'Accepted + In Progress -> Accepted + In Progress -> Completed + In Call'
Percentage of cases containing 'Completed + In Call' relative to all cases in the VINST incident management system
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + In Call' occurring as the final activity in a case
Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' that appear without a subsequent 'Completed + Resolved' or 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases where 'Completed + Resolved' does not happen

Name: Frequency of process variants where 'Completed + In Call' appears more than once
Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' activities that occur within 24 hours of the preceding 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of variants ending in 'Completed + In Call' versus those ending in 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + In Call' in comparison to the total frequency of all 'Completed + *' activities
Percentage of cases where 'Completed + In Call' is the only completed-type activity recorded
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases
